comment: No rootDir/outDir: the app imports sibling workspace sources via tsconfig
`paths` (packages/*), which live outside any local rootDir — setting one
triggers TS6059. The base config sets allowImportingTsExtensions + noEmit, so
the .ts-extension imports across this app mean `tsc` is a type-check (no emit);
the service runs directly from TypeScript (`node src/index.ts`).
